summary: If this is true, and verbose 'source' command logging is off (e.g. source_verbose is false), any 'source' command will be logged with 'Sourcing <filename>'. This can be useful to find which source files are calling other source files, or to log all the startup Tcl files that are loaded even though verbose logging is off.
description: If this is true, and verbose 'source' command logging is off (e.g. source_verbose is false), any 'source' command will be logged with 'Sourcing <filename>'. This can be useful to find which source files are calling other source files, or to log all the startup Tcl files that are loaded even though verbose logging is off.
